title: cTEC1_thymic epithelial cells_scRNA-seq
characteristics_ch1: Stage: 6months old human thymus | condition: Female healthy
treatment_protocol_ch1: Tissue was digsted with collagenase and dispase at single-cell level, stained form epithlial markers and 4 epithelial populations separated by FACS analysis based on surface markers expression
growth_protocol_ch1: Tissue was processed fresh after cardiothoracic surgery
extract_protocol_ch1: Thymic tissue fragments were dissociated to single cells by enzymatic treatment (0.4 mg/mL Collagenase D (Roche), 0.6 mg/mL Dispase II (Roche), 40 μg/mL DNAse I (Roche)) for about 30-45 minutes at 37ºC. Cells were pelleted and re-suspended for cell counting. single cell suspension was depleted of CD45 and CD235ab (red blood) expressing cells by immunomagnetic separation. The enriched fraction was stained and sorted using FACSAria III machine for cortical (EpCAMlowCD205+) and medullary  (EpCAMhighCD205-) thymic epithelial cells (TEC) | RNA libraries were prepared for sequencing using Chromium Single Cell 3' v2 protocol (PN-120233, 10X Genomics); cDNA amplification involved 12 PCR cycles
data_processing: 10X’s Cell Ranger software was used to de-multiplex Illumina BCL output, create fastq files and generate single cell feature counts for each library | Genome_build: GRCh38/hg19 | Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Raw read count matrix for each sample in form of the Cell Ranger matrix, features and barcodes files.
